formulas.cell: ="CraftSim CraftQueue" & "^""Mycobloom"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Mycobloom",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Mycobloom",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*C7) & "^""Arathor's Spear"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (4*C7) & "^""Writhing Sample"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (1*C7) & "^""Gilded Vial"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "1" & ";;" & (5*C7) & "^""Luredrop"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (4*C7)

="CraftSim CraftQueue" & "^""Orbinid"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Orbinid",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Orbinid",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (8*G7) & "^""Arathor's Spear"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (8*G7) & "^""Luredrop"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (8*G7) & "^""Blessing Blossom"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (8*G7) & "^""Null Lotus"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (1*G7) & "^""Gilded Vial"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "1" & ";;" & (2*G7)

="CraftSim CraftQueue" & "^""Orbinid"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Orbinid",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Orbinid",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*K8) & "^""Arathor's Spear"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*K8) & "^""Null Lotus"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (1*K8) & "^""Gilded Vial"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "1" & ";;" & (2*K8) & "^""Viridescent Spores"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (2*K8)

="CraftSim CraftQueue" & "^""Luredrop"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Luredrop",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*O8) & "^""Blessing Blossom"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*O8) & "^""Null Lotus"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (1*O8) & "^""Gilded Vial"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "1" & ";;" & (2*O8) & "^""Leyline Residue"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (2*O8)

="CraftSim CraftQueue" & "^""Blessing Blossom"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Blessing Blossom",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*S8) & "^""Arathor's Spear"";;;;;;;;;;;" & IF(VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,3,FALSE)<=VLOOKUP("Arathor's Spear",Data!A:G,5,FALSE),1,2) & ";;" & (12*S8) & "^""Null Lotus"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (1*S8) & "^""Gilded Vial"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "1" & ";;" & (2*S8) & "^""Leyline Residue"";;;;;;;;;;;" & "#" & ";;" & (2*S8)
